title: Generate options, not surprises
summary: Generation creates review candidates, reports status, and keeps the current slide unchanged until Apply.

signals.title: Review options
signals.body: Choose candidate count; five is default.

signals.title: What kind
signals.body: Try wording, structure, layout, or theme.

signals.title: Provider
signals.body: Use local rules, OpenAI, LM Studio, or OpenRouter.

guardrails.title: Session-only
guardrails.body: Candidates stay outside slide files until applied.

guardrails.title: Grounded
guardrails.body: Briefs, sources, and materials feed prompts.

guardrails.title: Shortened
guardrails.body: Overlong text can be rewritten semantically.

narration.script: Generation creates review candidates, reports status, and keeps the current slide unchanged until Apply. Choose candidate count; five is default.
